result:
All key line numbers confirmed. Here is the complete, verified inventory.

---

## oCMS Cache Layer Inventory

### 1. Config Cache

| | |
|---|---|
| **Package / file** | `internal/cache/config.go` — owned via `Manager.Config` (`manager.go:45`) |
| **Env vars** | `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` (default `3600` s) · `OCMS_REDIS_URL` · `OCMS_CACHE_PREFIX` (`"ocms:"`) — `config/config.go:36-39` |
| **TTL default** | `1 h` (hard-coded `time.Hour`; `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` feeds the distributed cache, not this layer directly — `manager.go:67`) |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidateConfig()` (`manager.go:195`) called from `handler/config.go:392` and `handler/themes.go:116`; `Manager.InvalidateThemeSettings()` delegates to it (`manager.go:206`); TTL expiry |
| **Consumers** | Frontend middleware `LoadSiteConfig`; theme settings lookup |

---

### 2. Sitemap Cache

| | |
|---|---|
| **Package / file** | `internal/cache/sitemap.go` — `Manager.Sitemap` (`manager.go:46`) |
| **Env vars** | `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` (1 h default) |
| **TTL default** | `1 h` (`NewSitemapCache(queries, time.Hour)` at `manager.go:67`) — checked via `time.Since(c.cachedAt) < c.ttl` |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidateSitemap()` (`manager.go:200`) called from `handler/cache.go:137`; `Manager.InvalidateContent()` (`manager.go:212`) called from `handler/pages.go:127` (also covers sitemap); TTL expiry |
| **Consumers** | `/sitemap.xml` frontend route |

---

### 3. Page Cache

| | |
|---|---|
| **Package / file** | `internal/cache/pages.go` — `Manager.Page` (`manager.go:50`) |
| **Env vars** | `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` (1 h default) |
| **TTL default** | `1 h` (`NewPageCache` called at `manager.go:71`) |
| **Cache key** | `{language}:{role}:{slug}` / `{language}:{role}:{id}` (context-aware; `cache/context.go:22-29`) |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidatePage(pageID)` (`manager.go:219`) — removes all lang/role variants — called from `handler/pages.go:127` and `api/v2/pages/service.go:274`; `Manager.InvalidatePages()` (`manager.go:227`) from `handler/cache.go:152`; `Manager.InvalidateContent()` cascades here too; TTL expiry |
| **Consumers** | Frontend page-by-slug and page-by-ID rendering (`Manager.GetPublishedPageBySlug`, `GetPublishedPageByID` — `manager.go:400-406`) |

---

### 4. Menu Cache

| | |
|---|---|
| **Package / file** | `internal/cache/menus.go` — `Manager.Menus` (`manager.go:47`) |
| **Env vars** | `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` (1 h default) |
| **TTL default** | `1 h` |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidateMenus()` (`manager.go:234`) from `handler/cache.go:167`; TTL expiry; `MenuCache.Invalidate()` clears maps and resets `loaded` flag |
| **Consumers** | Frontend menu rendering (`Manager.GetMenu(ctx, slug)` — `manager.go:368`); preloaded at startup via `Manager.Preload()` |

---

### 5. Language Cache

| | |
|---|---|
| **Package / file** | `internal/cache/languages.go` — `Manager.Language` (`manager.go:48`) |
| **Env vars** | `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` (1 h default) |
| **TTL default** | `1 h` |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidateLanguages()` (`manager.go:240`) from `handler/cache.go:182`; `LanguageCache.Invalidate()` sets `loaded=false` and clears data structures; TTL expiry |
| **Consumers** | `Manager.GetActiveLanguages()`, `GetDefaultLanguage()`, `GetLanguageByCode()` (`manager.go:374-384`); middleware language negotiation; preloaded at startup |

---

### 6. Translation Cache

| | |
|---|---|
| **Package / file** | `internal/cache/translations.go` — `Manager.Translation` (`manager.go:49`) |
| **Env vars** | **None** — TTL and capacity are hardcoded |
| **TTL default** | **30 min** (`ttl: 30 * time.Minute` at `translations.go:44`) — shorter than all other domain caches |
| **Cache key** | `translations[entityType][entityID][langCode]` — nested map (`translations.go:32-33`) |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidateTranslation(entityType, entityID)` (`manager.go:251`) removes entity; `Manager.InvalidateTranslations()` (`manager.go:246`) clears all; capacity-based LRU: `ensureCapacity()` (`translations.go:209`) evicts half the map when `≥ 10 000` entries; TTL expiry |
| **Consumers** | `Manager.GetTranslations()` and `GetTranslationsBatch()` (`manager.go:389-394`); multi-language content rendering |

---

### 7. General / Miscellaneous Cache

| | |
|---|---|
| **Package / file** | `internal/cache/cache.go` (`SimpleCache`) — `Manager.General` (`manager.go:51`) |
| **Env vars** | **None** — TTL is overridden to 5 min at construction; ignores `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` |
| **TTL default** | **5 min** (`New(5 * time.Minute)` at `manager.go:72`) |
| **Invalidation** | Background cleanup goroutine every **1 min** (`General.StartCleanup(time.Minute)` at `manager.go:122`); `Manager.ClearAll()` (`manager.go:168`) calls `General.Clear()`; restart; `DeleteByPrefix()` available |
| **Consumers** | Theme-settings prefix (`ThemeSettingsPrefix = "theme_settings_"` at `manager.go:73`); available for module/custom code via `Manager.General` |

---

### 8. HTTP Session Cache (SCS)

| | |
|---|---|
| **Package / file** | `internal/session/session.go` — uses `github.com/alexedwards/scs/v2` |
| **Backend** | SQLite (`sqlite3store.New(db)` at `session.go:29`) |
| **Env vars** | **None** — lifetime and cookie config are hardcoded |
| **TTL default** | **24 h** (`sm.Lifetime = 24 * time.Hour` at `session.go:41`) |
| **Invalidation** | Session `Destroy()` on logout; 24 h TTL expiry managed by SCS/SQLite; SCS cleanup removes expired rows |
| **Consumers** | All authenticated admin routes; flash messages; `sessionManager.LoadAndSave` middleware wraps every request |

---

### 9. API Key Rate-Limiter Cache

| | |
|---|---|
| **Package / file** | `internal/middleware/api.go` — `limiterCache[int64]` (keyed by API key ID) |
| **Env vars** | `OCMS_API_RATE_LIMIT` controls the rate (`default 100 req/min`); TTL and capacity are hardcoded |
| **TTL default (entry eviction)** | **10 min** (`limiterCacheTTL = 10 * time.Minute` at `api.go:924`) |
| **Cleanup interval** | **5 min** (`limiterCacheCleanupInterval = 5 * time.Minute` at `api.go:927`) |
| **Max entries** | 10 000 (`limiterCacheMaxEntries = 10000` at `api.go:932`); LRU eviction on overflow (`evictOldestIfExceedsLocked()` at `api.go:1011`) |
| **Invalidation** | `evictExpired()` goroutine (every 5 min); LRU eviction; restart |
| **Consumers** | `APIRateLimit()` middleware (`api.go:1040`) — per-API-key token bucket |

---

### 10. Global (IP-based) Rate-Limiter Cache

| | |
|---|---|
| **Package / file** | `internal/middleware/api.go` — `limiterCache[string]` (keyed by client IP), `GlobalRateLimiter` instance (`api.go:1064`) |
| **Env vars** | None for TTL/capacity; rate itself set at construction |
| **TTL / cleanup** | Same constants as #9: 10 min TTL, 5 min cleanup, 10 000 entry cap |
| **Invalidation** | Same as #9 |
| **Consumers** | Global rate limiter middleware applied to unauthenticated API surface |

---

### 11. Login Protection IP Rate-Limiter Cache

| | |
|---|---|
| **Package / file** | `internal/middleware/login_protection.go` — `limiterCache[string]` embedded in `LoginProtection` struct (`login_protection.go:39`) |
| **Env vars** | **None** — rate, burst, lockout thresholds are all hardcoded: `0.5 req/s`, burst `5`, lockout base `15 min` (`login_protection.go:79-83`) |
| **TTL / cleanup** | Same shared constants: 10 min TTL, 5 min cleanup (reuses `api.go:924,927`) |
| **Persistent layer** | `login_protection` SQLite table tracks `attempt_count`, `locked_until`, `lockout_count`; cleaned every 10 min (`CleanupStaleLoginProtection()` at `login_protection.go:299`) |
| **Invalidation** | In-memory: 5 min cleanup loop; DB: `RecordSuccessfulLogin()` (`login_protection.go:264`) deletes the row; `cleanupStaleEntries()` (`login_protection.go:307`) |
| **Consumers** | `LoginProtection.Middleware()` login endpoint (`login_protection.go:323`) |

---

### 12. HTTP Response Cache (browser / CDN headers)

| | |
|---|---|
| **Package / file** | `internal/middleware/cache.go` (`StaticCache` middleware) + `internal/handler/frontend.go` (per-handler `Cache-Control`) |
| **Env vars** | **None** — TTLs are hardcoded per route |
| **TTLs by content** | Static assets: **24 h** (`frontend.go:1596, 1647`); fingerprinted assets: **1 year** (`frontend.go:2897`); sitemap/robots, pages, categories/tags: **1 h** (`frontend.go:1662, 1679, 1701, 1497`); admin/search/forms: `no-store` (`frontend.go:1474, 2596`) |
| **Invalidation** | Client-side TTL expiry only; no server-side purge signal |
| **Consumers** | Browser cache; any CDN in front of the server |

---

### 13. Distributed Cache (Redis — optional)

| | |
|---|---|
| **Package / file** | `internal/cache/redis.go` — wired via `Manager.Distributed` (`manager.go:54`) |
| **When active** | Only when `OCMS_REDIS_URL` is set (`manager.go:86`); fallback to memory if connection fails (`FallbackToMemory: true`, `cmd/ocms/main.go:741`) |
| **Env vars** | `OCMS_REDIS_URL` · `OCMS_CACHE_PREFIX` (`"ocms:"`) · `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` (3600 s) · `OCMS_CACHE_MAX_SIZE` (10 000) — `config/config.go:36-39` |
| **Redis defaults** | Pool `10`, connect timeout `5 s`, read/write timeout `3 s` (`redis.go:58-61`) |
| **TTL default** | Inherits `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` (1 h) |
| **Invalidation** | Redis TTL expiry; `Manager.Stop()` closes the connection (`manager.go:126-133`); Redis `FLUSHDB` externally |
| **Consumers** | Multi-instance deployments sharing domain cache state across nodes |

---

### Quick-reference summary

| # | Cache | Backend | TTL | Env var(s) | Invalidation trigger |
|---|-------|---------|-----|-----------|---------------------|
| 1 | Config | SimpleCache (memory) | 1 h | `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` | Handler on config/theme save; TTL |
| 2 | Sitemap | SimpleCache | 1 h | `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` | Page change; admin cache clear; TTL |
| 3 | Page | SimpleCache (context-aware) | 1 h | `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` | Per-page ID on publish/update/delete; all-clear; TTL |
| 4 | Menu | SimpleCache | 1 h | `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` | Admin cache clear; TTL |
| 5 | Language | SimpleCache | 1 h | `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` | Admin cache clear; TTL |
| 6 | Translation | SimpleCache + nested map | **30 min** | *(none)* | Per-entity eviction; capacity LRU; TTL |
| 7 | General | SimpleCache | **5 min** | *(none)* | 1-min background sweep; `ClearAll`; restart |
| 8 | Session | SCS + SQLite | **24 h** | *(none)* | Logout (destroy); TTL |
| 9 | API key rate limit | `limiterCache[int64]` | 10 min | `OCMS_API_RATE_LIMIT` (rate only) | 5-min sweep; LRU; restart |
| 10 | Global IP rate limit | `limiterCache[string]` | 10 min | *(none)* | 5-min sweep; LRU; restart |
| 11 | Login IP rate limit | `limiterCache[string]` + SQLite | 10 min / 15 min lockout | *(none)* | 5-min sweep; successful login; DB cleanup |
| 12 | HTTP response | Browser / CDN headers | 1 h – 1 year | *(none)* | Client-side TTL only |
| 13 | Distributed (Redis) | Redis | 1 h | `OCMS_REDIS_URL`, `OCMS_CACHE_PREFIX`, `OCMS_CACHE_TTL`, `OCMS_CACHE_MAX_SIZE` | Redis TTL; connection close |
